title: hieracium bifidum subsp. phaeocybe
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. phaeocybe, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium bifidum subsp. phaeocybe can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
